attributes.description: Topic and partition topology: partition counts, current/oldest offsets, retained message volume. Capacity and throughput-inference views.

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS current_offset = SUM(offset) BY time_bucket, attributes.topic
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS current_offset = SUM(offset) BY time_bucket, attributes.topic
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Current Offset Over Time by Topic (Top 5)

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND attributes.topic IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition, time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS current_offset = SUM(offset) BY time_bucket, attributes.topic
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| SORT partitions DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| SORT partitions DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.oldest_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset),
        oldest_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.oldest_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL retained = current_offset - oldest_offset
| SORT attributes.topic ASC, attributes.partition ASC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.oldest_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset),
        oldest_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.oldest_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL retained = current_offset - oldest_offset
| SORT attributes.topic ASC, attributes.partition ASC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL AND kafka.partition.oldest_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS current_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset),
        oldest_offset = MAX(kafka.partition.oldest_offset)
    BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| EVAL retained = current_offset - oldest_offset
| SORT attributes.topic ASC, attributes.partition ASC
| LIMIT 100

embeddableConfig.content:
## [Kafka OTel] Topics & Partitions

Topic and partition metrics:
- Partition count per topic
- Current and oldest offsets
- Retained message volume (current − oldest)
- Replication factor and in-sync replicas

query.esql:
TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions_per_topic = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| STATS total_partitions = SUM(partitions_per_topic)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS partitions_per_topic = MAX(kafka.topic.partitions) BY attributes.topic
| STATS total_partitions = SUM(partitions_per_topic)

FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(attributes.topic)

FROM metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.topic.partitions IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(attributes.topic)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| STATS total = SUM(offset)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| STATS total = SUM(offset)

TS metrics-kafkametricsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "kafkametricsreceiver.otel"
| WHERE kafka.partition.current_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS offset = MAX(kafka.partition.current_offset) BY attributes.topic, attributes.partition
| STATS total = SUM(offset)

attributes.title: [Kafka OTel] Topics & Partitions
